segments.text: Getting the down air, he still managed to come back from that.
Yep, got some damage right there, but here it is.
Getting caught right there by that down air actually gave a little bit of momentum to Kameme.
He has to be leading in the center, there's the up tilt.

full_text: Getting the down air, he still managed to come back from that. Yep, got some damage right there, but here it is. Getting caught right there by that down air actually gave a little bit of momentum to Kameme. He has to be leading in the center, there's the up tilt. You have to...

corrections.original: a little bit of momentum to Kamehameha
corrections.corrected: a little bit of momentum to Kameme

corrections.original: He has to bleed in the center
corrections.corrected: He has to be leading in the center
